text.title: Supabase Backup and Restore Drill Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does production data live on managed Postgres (Supabase/Neon/Render)?

branch.question: Is the last drill ≤90 days old AND documented?

text.example: Supabase prod, last drill 6 months ago → run quarterly drill into clean clone project.
